output: Hello, this is your autonomous agent. How can I help you today?
How far! Na your agent dey talk. Wetin I fit do for you?
Ẹ káàárọ̀. Orúkọ mi ni Kusmus. Báwo ni mo ṣe lè ràn yín lọ́wọ́ lónìí?
Ndewo, onye enyemaka gị na-akpọ. Kedu ka m ga-esi nyere gị aka taa?
Sannu, wannan mataimakin AI ɗinku ne. Ta yaya zan iya taimaka muku a yau?
I have autonomously rerouted your connection to a faster, nearby tower (B-42). Please restart your phone to see the improvement.
Oga, we don help you move your line to tower B-42. E go quick now. Please restart your phone.
Mo ti ṣiṣẹ́, mo ti yí àsopọ̀ yín sí ibùdó B-42 tí ó yá. Jọ̀wọ́, ẹ pa fóònù yín, kí ẹ sì tan-án padà.
Edokwara m njikọ gị gaa na ụlọ elu B-42 dị nso ma na-agba ọsọ. Biko malitegharịa ekwentị gị ka ịhụ nkwalite.
Na karkatar da haɗin gwiwar ku zuwa wani hasumiya mai sauri (B-42). Don Allah a kashe wayar a sake kunnawa don ganin ci gaba.
This is the T-Mobile Autonomous Network Agent. We have detected a critical failure at Tower B-1138 in the Ikeja sector. Can you accept this dispatch?
Na Autonomous Agent dey call. Tower B-1138 for Ikeja side don down. You fit accept this dispatch?
Acknowledged. I have created work ticket TK-421, and your location is now linked to the incident. Please confirm once you are on-site.
I don hear. I don create ticket TK-421. Your location dey linked to the matter. Abeg, holla when you reach site.
I understand this is an urgent security matter. I can deactivate the SIM, but first, I must verify your identity using a 3-factor process to protect your account.
To begin, please tell me one of the following: Your 11-digit National Identification Number (NIN), OR the full email address registered to this account.
Thank you. For the second step, please tell me one of the following: Your full Date of Birth, OR the city and state where you originally registered this SIM card.
Thank you. For the final verification step, please confirm 3 of your last 5 actions. I will list 5 recent activities. Just say 'Yes' or 'No' for each one.
Your identity is fully verified. The SIM has been successfully deactivated. All services are blocked. A support ticket (SEC-9021) has been logged.
Verification complete. We don block the SIM. Everything don stop. We don log am with ticket number SEC-9021.
Ìfìdímúlẹ̀ yín ti pé. A ti dènà SIM yín. Gbogbo iṣẹ́ ti dúró. A ti kọ ọ́ sílẹ̀ pẹ̀lú nọ́ńbà SEC-9021.
Nkwenye gị zuru oke. Egbochiela SIM gị. Ọrụ niile akwụsịla. Edebere ya na nọmba tiketi SEC-9021.
An tabbatar da bayanan ku. An kashe SIM ɗin. An katse dukkan ayyuka. An shigar da rahoton da lambar tikiti SEC-9021.

input: task: health_confirm_appointment | lang: en | entities: {"doctor": "Dr. Adebayo", "time": "10:00 AM"}
output: Hello, this is your SafeMamaPikin agent calling to confirm your antenatal appointment for tomorrow with Dr. Adebayo at 10:00 AM. Please say 'Yes' to confirm.

input: task: health_confirm_appointment | lang: pidgin | entities: {"doctor": "Dr. Adebayo", "time": "10:0Un 0 AM"}
output: Hello, na your SafeMamaPikin agent dey call to check if you dey come for your antenatal meeting tomorrow with Dr. Adebayo by 10 o'clock. Abeg, talk 'Yes' if you dey come.
I understand your frustration and I'm sorry I couldn't find a slot. I am transferring you to a human supervisor right now.
I see say you dey vex, and I sorry say I no fit find space. I dey transfer you to my oga (human supervisor) now now.
Mo gbọ́ yín, inú yín ò dùn. Ẹ má bínú pé mi ò rí ààyè. Mo ń gbé ìpè yín lọ sọ́dọ̀ olùdarí mi báyìí.
Aghọtara m na iwe were gị. Biko, ewela iwe na ahụghị m ohere. A na m ebufe gị na onye nlekọta mmadụ ugbu a.
Na fahimci fushin ka, kuma ina ba ka haƙuri ban sami wuri ba. Ina tura kiran ka zuwa ga babban jami'in mu yanzu.
